description: The complete set of intents enShell recognises. Choose one of these intent names. Use ask_clarification for anything not covered.

intents.description: Find the largest files in a directory tree.
intents.name: find_large_files

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Omit to use adapter default.

min_size.description: Minimum file size to report, e.g. '100M'. Omit to use adapter default.

intents.description: Identify the process listening on a given TCP/UDP port.
intents.name: find_process_using_port

intents.description: Terminate a process by PID, name, or port. At least one of pid/name/port must be supplied.
intents.name: kill_process

force.description: Use SIGKILL / force-kill instead of graceful termination.

port.description: Kill the process listening on this port.

intents.description: Install a software package via a package manager.
intents.name: install_package

manager.description: Package manager to use, e.g. 'brew', 'apt', 'npm', 'cargo'. Omit to auto-detect.

version.description: Specific version to install. Omit for latest.

intents.description: Start a system service by name.
intents.name: start_service

intents.description: Stop a running system service by name.
intents.name: stop_service

intents.description: Open a file or folder in the default application (e.g. Finder, Explorer, xdg-open).
intents.name: open_file_or_folder

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file or folder.

intents.description: Compress a directory into an archive (tar.gz or zip).
intents.name: compress_folder

exclude.description: Paths or glob patterns to exclude from the archive.

output.description: Output archive path. Omit to auto-generate alongside source.

intents.description: Create a backup copy of a file or directory.
intents.name: create_backup

dest.description: Destination path for the backup. Omit to use a timestamped path alongside the source.

path.description: File or directory to back up.

intents.description: Explain a command error or non-zero exit code in plain English.
intents.name: explain_error

exit_code.description: The exit code the command returned.

intents.description: Suggest a corrected version of the last command that failed.
intents.name: fix_last_command

exit_code.description: The non-zero exit code it returned.

last_command.description: The command text that was run.

stderr.description: The captured stderr output (may be empty string).

intents.description: Update installed packages, optionally scoped to a package manager or scope.
intents.name: update_packages

manager.description: Package manager to update, e.g. 'brew', 'apt'. Omit to update all detected managers.

scope.description: Scope or namespace to restrict updates (e.g. npm workspace name).

intents.description: Run a system health check: disk, memory, CPU load, and critical process status.
intents.name: check_system_health

intents.description: Retrieve and display recent log entries from a system or application log.
intents.name: inspect_logs

filter.description: Keyword or pattern to filter log lines.

since.description: Time window, e.g. '1h', '30m', '2024-01-01'. Omit for recent entries.

source.description: Set ONLY to name a specific application/service log such as 'nginx' or 'postgresql'. OMIT for general or system logs — the default already reads the system log.

intents.description: List the running processes.
intents.name: list_processes

intents.description: Show filesystem disk usage (free and used space).
intents.name: disk_usage

intents.description: Show active network connections and listening sockets.
intents.name: network_connections

intents.description: Show the git status of the current repository.
intents.name: git_status

intents.description: Show memory (RAM) usage.
intents.name: show_memory

intents.description: Scaffold a new project from a template (e.g. a Rust binary, Next.js app).
intents.name: create_project

path.description: Parent directory for the new project. Omit to use the current directory.

intents.description: Stage and commit changes in the current git repository.
intents.name: git_commit_changes

add_all.description: If true, stage all tracked and untracked changes before committing.

intents.description: Ask the user a clarifying question when the request is unclear, ambiguous, or unsupported. Use this instead of guessing.
intents.name: ask_clarification

options.description: Optional list of suggested answers to present to the user.

question.description: The clarifying question to ask the user.
